notes: Scarcity fill: July Terézváros (Seal @ MVM Dome — 2nd arena show), August (BSW sold-out return), first September 2026 slot (Bëlga). Catalog before: 11 events; 0 in Sep; Aug had Moby only; Terézváros had Sting only. Promo sources: livenation dynamicmedia, budapestpark cdn-netpositive / uploads.
missingOrUncertain: BSW / Bëlga exact stage time not on budapestpark.hu — using 20:00 after published gates (BSW 17:00, Bëlga 18:00).
Seal higher seated/standing tiers not enumerated on livenation.hu at ingest — single published floor from funcode.hu.
BSW early-bird 9,999 HUF phase passed — current arena tier 11,999 HUF on budapestpark.hu ticket shop.

document.title: Seal — greatest hits at MVM Dome
document.shortDescription: Seal returns to Hungary after 15 years — Thursday 30 July 2026, 19:00 at MVM Dome (Kiss From a Rose, Crazy, Killer).
document.longDescription:
British soul-pop icon Seal plays his greatest hits at MVM Dome on Thursday 30 July 2026 at 19:00 — his first Hungarian show in 15 years. The velvet voice behind Kiss From a Rose, Crazy, and Killer headlines the arena at 1143 Budapest, Stefánia út 2 (Terézváros). Tickets from 25,200 HUF via funcode.hu and livenation.hu (additional checkout fees may apply).

Sources: https://www.livenation.hu/en/tickets/seal-budapest-events-edp1655733 https://funcode.hu/en/event/3764-seal

entryFees.label: From — general on-sale
entryFees.notes: Higher tiers at checkout; payment/delivery fees per funcode.hu

document.title: BSW — sold-out return at Budapest Park
document.shortDescription: Hungarian rap duo BSW round two after last year’s sell-out — Friday 7 August 2026, gates 17:00 at Budapest Park.
document.longDescription:
BSW return to Budapest Park on Friday 7 August 2026 for round two after last year’s sold-out open-air show. Gates open at 17:00 at 1095 Budapest, Fábián Juli tér 1 (Ferencváros). Arena and terrace tiers on budapestpark.hu; VIP presales ran ahead of general on-sale.

Sources: https://www.budapestpark.hu/en/events/bsw-20260807 https://www.budapestpark.hu/tickets/event/BSW_20260807

document.title: Bëlga — park in the park at Budapest Park
document.shortDescription: Hungarian alt-rock legends Bëlga build another stage world — Saturday 12 September 2026, gates 18:00.
document.longDescription:
Bëlga return to Budapest Park on Saturday 12 September 2026 after last year’s “park inside the park” album show (Egyre gondolunk). Gates 18:00 at 1095 Budapest, Fábián Juli tér 1 (Ferencváros), with special guests teased on the official page. Tickets on budapestpark.hu.

Sources: https://www.budapestpark.hu/en/events/belga-20260912 https://www.budapestpark.hu/tickets/event/BELGA260912
